books.description: A Coast Guard vet named Carl and his ex-girlfriend’s cat, Princess Donut, are trapped in a fantasy dungeon. Read by Jeff Hays. 13 hours, 31 minutes unabridged.
books.title: DUNGEON CRAWLER CARL

books.author: Allen Levi
books.description: A man travels to a small Southern town, where he purchases pencil drawings of local residents and exchanges them for stories. Read by David Morse. 13 hours, 12 minutes unabridged.
books.title: THEO OF GOLDEN

books.author: Freida McFadden
books.description: After her husband ends their marriage and she turns her attention to his new girlfriend, Naomi suspects she might be in danger. Read by January LaVoy, Edoardo Ballerini and Marin Ireland. 8 hours, 1 minute unabridged.
books.title: THE DIVORCE

books.author: Ann Patchett
books.description: Decades after their time together, a woman reconnects with her stepfather and they look back at the directions their lives have taken. Read by the author. 10 hours, 44 minutes unabridged.
books.title: WHISTLER

books.author: Matt Dinniman
books.description: The second book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. Carl and Donut confront an ancient spell and heightened dangers. Read by Jeff Hays. 11 hours, 28 minutes unabridged.
books.title: CARL'S DOOMSDAY SCENARIO

books.author: Andy Weir
books.description: Ryland Grace awakes from a long sleep alone and far from home, and the fate of humanity rests on his shoulders. Read by Ray Porter. 16 hours, 10 minutes unabridged.
books.title: PROJECT HAIL MARY

books.author: Matt Dinniman
books.description: The third book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. Carl and Donut are up against a subway system filled with monsters. 16 hours, 54 minutes unabridged.
books.title: THE DUNGEON ANARCHIST'S COOKBOOK

books.author: Matt Dinniman
books.description: The eighth book in the “Dungeon Crawler Carl” series. A sense of normalcy might be a set-up that spells danger for Carl and Donut. Read by Jeff Hays. 20 hours, 27 minutes unabridged.
books.title: A PARADE OF HORRIBLES

books.author: Matt Dinniman
books.description: The fourth book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. Obstacles abound on the fifth floor of the dungeon. Read by Jeff Hays. 18 hours, 3 minutes unabridged.
books.title: THE GATE OF THE FERAL GODS

books.author: Matt Dinniman
books.description: The fifth book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. The action moves to the sixth floor, which is known as the Hunting Grounds. Read by Jeff Hays. 23 hours, 33 minutes unabridged.
books.title: THE BUTCHER'S MASQUERADE

books.author: Matt Dinniman
books.description: The sixth book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. On the eighth floor, Carl and Donut must capture a dangerous monster. Read by Jeff Hays, Patrick Warburton, Travis Baldree and Annie Ellicott. 26 hours, 46 minutes unabridged.
books.title: THE EYE OF THE BEDLAM BRIDE

books.author: Elle Kennedy
books.description: Hannah Wells makes a deal with the captain of the college hockey team in exchange for tutoring him that may complicate their relationship. Read by Christian Fox and Lorelei Avalon. 12 hours, 25 minutes unabridged.
books.title: THE DEAL

books.author: Matt Dinniman
books.description: The seventh book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. After becoming fully self-aware, the NPCs join the Faction Wars. Read by Jeff Hays and Travis Baldree. 28 hours, 40 minutes unabridged.
books.title: THIS INEVITABLE RUIN

books.author: Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan
books.contributor: by Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan
books.description: Two White House correspondents for The New York Times delve into the first year of President Trump's second term. Read by Robert Petkoff. 17 hours, 7 minutes unabridged.
books.title: REGIME CHANGE

books.author: Belle Burden
books.description: Burden retraces her marriage of 20 years in search of clues to help shape her understanding about its demise and to find a way forward. Read by the author. 7 hours, 4 minutes unabridged.
books.title: STRANGERS

books.author: David Sedaris
books.description: Essays on the passage of time, complicated relationships and some unexpected delights life has to offer. Read by the author. 7 hours, 26 minutes unabridged.
books.title: THE LAND AND ITS PEOPLE

books.description: The vice president and author of “Hillbilly Elegy” describes how he perceives his faith played a part in his work in public life. Read by the author. 7 hours, 50 minutes unabridged.
books.title: COMMUNION

books.author: Lena Dunham
books.description: The author of “Not That Kind of Girl” evaluates the effects that pursuing her creative endeavors had on her. Read by the author. 11 hours, 47 minutes unabridged.
books.title: FAMESICK

books.description: The author of “Say Nothing” details the efforts by the parents of a 19-year-old Londoner to uncover the truth about his mysterious death and secret life. Read by the author. 13 hours unabridged.

books.author: Jill Biden
books.description: The former first lady recounts her time in the White House, causes she championed and her simultaneous work as a community college professor. Read by the author. 7 hours, 42 minutes unabridged.
